'''Galle''' was a [[Clone Lieutenant]] who served in the the [[Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. In [[19 BBY]], they were stationed on the [[planet]] [[Felucia]] and [[Battle of Felucia (Outer Rim Sieges)|served]] alongside [[Jedi General]] [[Aayla Secura]]. When [[Order 66]] was issued by [[Supreme Chancellor]] [[Darth Sidious|Palpatine]], Galle opened fire on Secura alongside the other [[Cloning|clones]] present, [[Death|killing]] her.

==Biography==
[[File:GalleOnFelucia-SWBC53.png|thumb|left|220px|Lieutenant Galle on Felucia]]
Galle was the taken name<ref name="Card Trader">{{SWCT|set=Rank & File|cardname=Clone Lieutenant Galle}}</ref> of a [[Cloning|clone]] of the [[human]] [[Gender|male]] [[bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett]] created on the [[planet]] [[Kamino]] to fight for the [[Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="Clone Troopers" /> In [[19 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Atlas]]'' dates the events of {{Film|III}} to [[19 BBY]].</ref> during the [[Clone Wars]] they held the [[Military rank|rank]] of [[Clone Lieutenant|lieutnenant]]<ref name="Card Trader" /> and served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic]]'s [[327th Star Corps]] under the [[Commanding officer|command]] of [[Clone Commander]] [[Bly]] and [[Jedi General]] [[Aayla Secura]].<ref name="ROTS" />

Along with the rest of the [[corps]], Galle was deployed to the [[planet]] [[Felucia]] to [[Battle of Felucia (Outer Rim Sieges)|battle]] the [[Separatist Droid Army|Separatist forces]] there. Galle and Bly were amongst a group of [[clone trooper]]s who stood with Secura at the head of a column of Republic vehicles as they prepared to engage approaching [[Confederacy military|Separatist forces]] when [[Supreme Chancellor]] [[Darth Sidious|Palpatine]] issued [[Order 66]] to all clones, decreeing all members of the [[Jedi Order]] traitors to the Republic. Galle and the other [[trooper]]s then opened fire on Secura, shooting her in the back and [[Death|killing]] her.<ref name="ROTS" />

==Personality and traits==
[[File:Galle-SWCT.png|thumb|right|250px|Galle wearing Phase II armor in the colors of the 327th Star Corps.]]
Like all clones of Fett, Galle stood 1.83 [[meter]]s tall.<ref name="Clone Troopers" />

==Equipment==
While on Felucia, Galle wore [[Phase II clone trooper armor]] with a [[pauldron]] and a [[kama]], all of which were decorated in the yellow coloring of the 327th Star Corps. Galle was equipped with a [[DC-15A blaster carbine]] and two [[DC-17 repeater hand blaster|DC-17 hand blasters]], which they carried in [[holster]]s on a [[utility belt]].<ref name="ROTS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Galle first appeared in the [[2005]] [[prequel trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].<ref name="ROTS" /> In the current ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]], Galle was first identified on a card released through the ''[[Star Wars: Card Trader]]'' app.<ref name="Card Trader" /> The [[Galle/Legends|character]] originated in [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]], where he was first created for [[Paul Ens]] and [[Tom Hodges]]' [[Star Wars comic books|webstrip]], ''[[Reversal of Fortune]]'', which was published starting in [[2004]].<ref name="RoF">''[[Reversal of Fortune]]''</ref> In the [[2018]] reference book ''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary, New Edition]]'', an image of Galle is mistakenly labeled as being Clone [[Commander]] Bly.<ref name="CVD">''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary, New Edition]]''</ref>
